changelog: FIX (likely root cause of the 'no matching channels' for every game) — bumped OkHttp read timeout 15s → 60s. The first /api/sports/game/{id}/channels call after a cold start triggers an 11s xmltv.php fetch on the backend; with a 15s read timeout the TV was timing out on slower networks BEFORE the response could come back, then silently rendering 'no matches'. Subsequent calls hit the 4-hour warm cache and return in <100ms.

DIAGNOSTICS — gameChannels() now returns a typed result (Success / NoEpgMatch / Failure). The picker shows the ACTUAL failure reason (timeout, parse error, HTTP code, etc.) instead of a generic 'no matches' message, so we can root-cause future issues from a single screenshot.
Verified backend-side: Anaheim Ducks @ Vegas Golden Knights still returns 10 channels (5 Sportsnet, TVA Sports, 4 US) — server is healthy.
